2222990.name: Graceward - Complete Edition Soundtrack
2222990.description:
Graceward's original soundtrack is brimming with heavy industrial sounds, villainous melodies, and the rich ambience of the wasteland. The album contains the themes for every level and all songs between. Every track is written and composed by the mastermind, Shelbee Michael.

Purchases of the album helps to support us in our pursuits of game design and music.
